prose:
Oxygen (O₂) frontier-orbital analysis via DFT: tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet open-shell). Geometry: user-supplied O₂ at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz, single-point (not optimized). SCF converged in 7 cycles. HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans-style orbital gap, defined as LUMO energy minus HOMO energy): 5.288 eV. HOMO = −8.874 eV, LUMO = −3.586 eV. Vertical ionization potential (Koopmans) = 8.874 eV, vertical electron affinity (Koopmans) = 3.586 eV. Total electronic energy = −150.389 Hartree. Integrity status: trustworthy; energy finite, SCF converged, schema valid.</prose>
